description: verbose association setup instead of declarative has_many/belongs_to macros
input:
class Post
  def comments
    Comment.where(post_id: self.id).order('created_at ASC')
  end

  def author
    User.find(self.author_id)
  end

  def tags
    Tag.joins(:post_tags).where(post_tags: { post_id: self.id })
  end
end
